nodes.label: Efficient Kernel Based 3-D Source Localization via Tensor Completion (Lu et al., KSII TIIS 2019)
nodes.source_location: KSII Transactions on Internet and Information Systems, Vol. 13, No. 1, Jan 2019
nodes.author: Shan Lu, Jun Zhang, Xianmin Ma, Changju Kan

nodes.label: Tensor Completion for Incomplete RSS Fingerprint Database Recovery
nodes.rationale: Exploiting the low-rank property of RSS spatial correlation matrices allows tensor completion to recover missing fingerprint entries from sparse measurements, drastically reducing site-survey overhead for 3D environments.

nodes.label: Kernel-Based Learning for Fingerprint Matching
nodes.rationale: Kernel-based matching in the positioning phase clarifies the non-linear relationship between fingerprint measurements and locations, improving sensitivity and accuracy beyond nearest-neighbor approaches.

hyperedges.label: Matrix/Tensor Completion Methods for Radio Map Construction
